_title: Pan-NR4A design-mode readout: the CAR-T (ex-vivo T-cell de-exhaustion) pole of the family selectivity matrix
_purpose: Re-analysis (no new compute) of the EXISTING state-matched family selectivity matrix (repurposed ChEMBL library) and the de-novo funnel, reading out the PAN-NR4A cell (candidates that engage all three opened NR4A pockets) instead of the NR4A3-selective cell. Pan-NR4A degradation is the profile wanted for the ex-vivo CAR-T application (chemical route to the NR4A triple-KO that reverses T-cell exhaustion; Chen et al., Nature 2019), where intra-family selectivity is unnecessary and ex-vivo/transient use removes the systemic-toxicity constraint that motivates NR4A3-selectivity in vivo. See research/manuscripts/nr4a3-degrader-carT-and-family-druggability-framing.md.
_weight: Docking-level cells are state-matched opened-pocket screening PRIORS, not affinities (same weight as the NR4A3-selective docking cells in paper 2.4). MM-GBSA margins are single-snapshot (noise-caveated per paper 2.5 decoy control); here they only confirm the candidate is NOT NR4A3-preferring (i.e. balanced/pan), which is the desired direction for this mode. 'Developable' = the automated gate (BRENK-free + no curated structural liability + aromatic ring + SAscore<=4.5 + >=4 engageable-handle contacts); necessary-not-sufficient (a deeper medchem review can still flag liabilities, cf. denovo_15). No molecule synthesized.
_generated: 2026-07-08, from report-matrix-aws.yml (run 28935050401) + report-denovo-aws.yml (run 28935054929), reading the committed S3 matrix/de-novo results.
reference: Chen J, Lopez-Moyado IF, ... Rao A. NR4A transcription factors limit CAR T cell function in solid tumours. Nature 2019;567:530-534.

members.label: celastrol
members.note: Engages all three, but a KNOWN promiscuous covalent binder; Munoz-Tello 2020 reports celastrol does NOT directly bind the NR4A LBD, so weak as a real pan lead (liability, not a clean hit).

members.label: NR4A3-active:CHEMBL1873475
members.note: Real ChEMBL NR4A active; engages all three (NR4A2 strongest).

members.label: NR4A3-active:CHEMBL187xxxx
members.note: Cleanest pan fingerprint in the repurposed library: essentially EQUIPOTENT across all three paralogues (|margin| <= 0.4) -- the balanced tri-paralogue engagement the pan-NR4A mode wants.

denovo_pan_cell.note: The de-novo funnel (DiffSBDD, pocket-conditioned) was run FOR NR4A3-selectivity. Its 'confirmed_nonselective / pan-NR4A' rejects are exactly the developable pan-NR4A binders the CAR-T mode wants -- one campaign, both poles. mmMargin is the NR4A3-selectivity margin; negative/near-zero + all-three-engaged = pan engagement.
denovo_pan_cell._manual_triage_note: Local RDKit triage (2026-07-08) beyond the automated gate: NEITHER pan lead hits PAINS/BRENK/NIH, but BOTH carry generative-model liabilities the gate misses (as paper 2.5 warns the gate is necessary-not-sufficient, cf. denovo_15). So these are gate-developable pan chemotype/pose HYPOTHESES to be redesigned into stable analogues, NOT clean developable molecules -- symmetric with the selective pole's honest treatment of denovo_15.

developable_pan_candidates.label: denovo_106
manual_liabilities: conjugated diene / exocyclic alkylidene in the cyclohexadiene ring (reactive-unsaturation artifact, same class as denovo_15's cyclopentadiene)
developable_pan_candidates.note: LEAD pan-NR4A candidate by promise (0.782 QED, SA 3.8, engages all 5 engageable handles + conserved pocket, pan-NR4A state-matched cell). PAINS/BRENK/NIH-clean, but manual RDKit triage flags a reactive diene/alkylidene system -> a pan chemotype/pose hypothesis to redesign, not a developable molecule.

developable_pan_candidates.label: denovo_86
manual_liabilities: N,O-acetal (hemiaminal ether) at the stereocenter (hydrolytically labile)
developable_pan_candidates.note: Second pan hit (fluoro-aryl-ether amino-dihydrofuran), engages all three opened pockets; PAINS/BRENK-clean but an N,O-acetal + high logP -> also a redesign hypothesis.

other_pan_cell_denovo_not_developable.label: denovo_51
other_pan_cell_denovo_not_developable.note: Strong pan engagement but fails developability gate (cyclobutene-dione / carbamic-acid liabilities).

conclusion: The pan-NR4A design mode is DEMONSTRATED in the existing framework at both tiers with NO new compute: (1) the repurposed library populates a pan-NR4A cell including an essentially equipotent tri-paralogue engager; (2) the de-novo funnel's own non-selective rejects include TWO gate-developable pan-NR4A binders (denovo_106 the lead), each carrying generative-model liabilities (so chemotype/pose hypotheses, not developable molecules -- symmetric with the selective pole's denovo_15). This banks the artefact the family-druggability reframe leans on -- one cryptic-pocket framework, tuned to opposite poles of the NR4A selectivity axis (NR4A3-selective for cancer; pan-NR4A for ex-vivo CAR-T de-exhaustion).
_pan_designed_campaign_note: DONE 2026-07-08 (trimcrae go-ahead). The code change landed (nr4a3_denovo.py now computes conserved-core contact for residues 411/481/485 and drives denovo_promise by it when CAMPAIGN=pan, so generation ranks conserved-core engagers to the top and into the dock -- a genuine designed-for pan set, not a relabelled selective run). Ran generate (campaign=pan, 200 mols, run 28936737785) -> dock into the 3 opened pockets (run 28937575876) -> report (28938420060). See pan_designed_campaign below.

pan_designed_campaign._what: The conserved-core-DESIGNED pan campaign (vs the selective-run by-catch above). Generation ranked by conserved-core (411/481/485) contact; top-N developable docked into NR4A3/NR4A1/NR4A2 opened pockets.
pan_designed_campaign.interpretation: Designing FOR the conserved core flips the census: pan-NR4A is now the DOMINANT cell (4/7 docked) and ZERO candidates are NR4A3-selective -- the mirror image of the selective de-novo run (where pan was the by-catch). This is the designed-for demonstration the reframe wanted: the SAME framework, retargeted to the conserved core, produces a pan-NR4A-dominant set. Docking-tier priors (not affinities); no molecule synthesized. Contacts below are from the DOCK pose (smina redock into the release frame), which re-poses vs the generation pose.

pan_leads.label: denovo_9
pan_leads.note: LEAD pan-NR4A designed candidate. Near-EQUIPOTENT across all three paralogues (all within 0.4 kcal/mol) AND MAXIMAL conserved-core engagement (3/3 conserved residues contacted). RDKit triage CLEAN -- no PAINS/BRENK/NIH, no curated reactive/unstable liabilities, drug-like logP 1.74 (TPSA 116 a mild permeability watch). A genuinely clean pan lead -- materially better than the selective-run by-catch (denovo_106/86 both carried liabilities).

pan_leads.label: denovo_61
pan_leads.note: Clean (no catalog or curated flags); logP 4.17 borderline. Bis-aryl-ether nitrile + cyclohexane carboxylic acid.

pan_leads.label: denovo_79
manual_liabilities: cyclic imine / iminolactam (isoquinolinone C=N tautomer) -- minor
pan_leads.note: Highest QED (0.835), engages all three (slightly paralogue-favoured); one minor cyclic-imine flag.

pan_leads.label: denovo_125
pan_leads.note: Highest QED (0.893) but only 1 aromatic ring + a non-aromatic diene ring; logP 4.41.

pan_designed_campaign.conclusion: The pan-DESIGNED campaign is a stronger result than the by-catch readout: (1) census flips to pan-NR4A-dominant (4/7, 0 selective); (2) it yields a CLEAN developable lead, denovo_9 -- balanced tri-paralogue engagement, maximal (3/3) conserved-core contact, no liabilities -- where the selective-run by-catch had none clean. Runs: gen 28936737785, dock 28937575876, report 28938420060. Aggregate spend ~$3-6 (g5 generation + c5 dock), under the $10 gate.
